examples: Or maybe it's just the result of a long, slow process of indoctrination.
Weeks earlier, we had started our indoctrination phase with over 220 students.
Indoctrination in education is the one of patterns of the great influence of education in west.
Store managers from around the world are all flown to Tokyo to receive several months of indoctrination at Uniqlo's global training academy.
Sensitivity training is now accepted as a normal part of workplace indoctrination.
